comment: Validated metrics from Grafana dashboards (redis_dashboard.json). Metrics collected from Redis exporter and chaos-toolkit instrumentation.

rate(db_redis_command_count_total[1m]).description: Redis command execution rate per second (measures cache responsiveness and throughput)

rate(db_redis_command_latency_bucket[1m].description: Command latency histogram (use with histogram_quantile for percentiles)

db_redis_memory_used_bytes.description: Memory used by Redis server (indicates dataset size and eviction pressure)

extended_metrics.description: Extended metrics that may be available from Redis exporter (optional, for enhanced monitoring)

available_metrics.name: redis_keyspace_hits_total
available_metrics.description: Total cache hits (use with rate() and with keyspace_misses for hit ratio)

available_metrics.name: redis_keyspace_misses_total
available_metrics.description: Total cache misses (use with rate() and with keyspace_hits for miss ratio)

available_metrics.name: redis_evicted_keys_total
available_metrics.description: Total evicted keys (use with rate() - high values indicate memory pressure)

notes.command_latency_histogram: The db_redis_command_latency_bucket metric is a histogram. Use histogram_quantile(0.95, rate(db_redis_command_latency_bucket[1m])) to calculate 95th percentile latency.
notes.memory_usage_explanation: Redis memory usage includes all keys and overhead. Monitor memory_used_bytes relative to memory_max_bytes to detect eviction risk.
notes.cache_efficiency: Calculate cache hit ratio = keyspace_hits / (keyspace_hits + keyspace_misses). Ratios >95% are healthy.
notes.connected_clients_note: Each client connection consumes memory. Monitor connection count as proxy for connection pool utilization.
notes.key_eviction_note: High evicted_keys_total rate indicates memory pressure. This causes cache miss rate increases and latency spikes.
notes.all_metrics_validated: All metrics in this file are validated against redis_dashboard.json Grafana dashboard
